name: Suspicious Scheduled Task Copying Files from SYSVOL to Public Folder
description: Detects the execution of a scheduled task that copies files from the domain's SYSVOL share to the local C:\Users\Public directory. This behavior is highly suspicious and is a known technique used by threat actors to distribute malicious payloads, scripts, or staging tools across an entire domain. This activity is frequently automated by pushing the scheduled task through a Group Policy Object (GPO) to ensure persistence and wide-scale deployment.

rules.name: Suspicious Scheduled Task Copying Files from SYSVOL to Public Folder

author: Ahmed Kamal & Yusuf Madkour
